users.default_address: 4512 Shoal Creek Blvd, Apt 7C, Austin, TX 78756

products.title: Dried Scotch Bonnet Peppers, Whole - Caribbean Hot Peppers for Jerk Seasoning and Caribbean Cooking, 4 oz Bag
products.description: Authentic dried whole scotch bonnet peppers sourced from the Caribbean. Intense fruity heat with a distinctive tropical flavor that sets them apart from habaneros. Perfect for jerk marinades, hot sauces, and Caribbean stews. Air-dried to preserve full flavor and color. Resealable bag for freshness.

products.title: Jamaican Pimento Wood Chips for Grilling and Smoking - Authentic Allspice Wood for Jerk Chicken and BBQ, 2 lb Bag
products.description: Genuine Jamaican pimento (allspice) wood chips for grilling and smoking. The traditional wood used in authentic jerk cooking, imparting a warm, sweet, aromatic smoke that cannot be replicated with other woods. Kiln-dried and cut to ideal chip size for charcoal grills and smokers. Each bag is approximately 2 lbs.

products.title: ThermoPro TP20 Wireless Remote Digital Cooking Food Meat Thermometer with Dual Probe for Smoker Grill BBQ Thermometer
products.description: Wireless meat thermometer with dual stainless steel probes for monitoring two types of meat or smoker/grill temperature simultaneously. 300-foot wireless range with no WiFi needed. Pre-set USDA-approved temperatures for 9 types of meat and their doneness levels. Large backlit LCD display on both transmitter and receiver. Timer and alarm functions.

products.title: Lodge 6 Quart Enameled Cast Iron Dutch Oven with Lid - Dual Handles, Oven Safe up to 500 Degrees F, Midnight Chrome
products.description: Premium enameled cast iron Dutch oven by Lodge. 6-quart capacity is ideal for braising, slow cooking, soups, and baking bread. Smooth glass surface won't react to ingredients. Cast iron loop side handles for secure grip. Stainless steel knob is oven safe to 500 degrees F. Works on all cooktops including induction. Made in USA.

products.title: Fluval M300 Submersible Aquarium Heater, 300W for Freshwater and Saltwater Tanks up to 80 Gal
products.description: Reliable 300W submersible heater with integrated temperature dial and shatterproof construction. Slim profile fits easily behind driftwood or plants. Suction cup mounting, auto-shutoff safety feature, and precision thermostat holds within 1 degree F. Ideal for 40-80 gallon freshwater and saltwater setups.

products.title: Fluval E300 Advanced Electronic Heater, 300W with Dual Temp Sensors and LCD Display
products.description: Advanced 300W electronic heater featuring real-time LCD temperature readout and VueTech color alert system. Dual temperature sensors provide accurate readings and fast response to fluctuations. Fish guard included. Suitable for aquariums up to 100 gallons.

products.title: Seachem Prime Fresh and Saltwater Conditioner - Chemical Remover and Detoxifier 500 mL
products.description: Concentrated conditioner for both freshwater and saltwater. Removes chlorine, chloramine, and ammonia. Detoxifies nitrite and nitrate. Non-acidic and will not impact pH. Treats up to 5,000 gallons. Use during water changes and when adding new water.

products.title: Zyrtec 24 Hour Allergy Relief Tablets with 10 mg Cetirizine HCl, 90 Count
products.description: Get 24-hour relief from indoor and outdoor allergy symptoms. Each tablet contains 10 mg of cetirizine HCl, starts working at hour 1 and stays strong day after day. Relieves sneezing, runny nose, itchy and watery eyes, and itchy throat or nose.

products.title: Flonase Allergy Relief Nasal Spray, 24 Hour Non Drowsy Allergy Medicine, 3 Pack of 120 Sprays
products.description: 24-hour non-drowsy relief from nasal congestion, sneezing, itchy and watery eyes, and runny nose. Contains fluticasone propionate 50 mcg per spray. 3-pack value bundle with 120 metered sprays per bottle.

products.title: Steam Gift Card $50 - Digital Code
products.description: Redeem on Steam for games, in-game items, software, and hardware. Delivered as a digital code via Amazon. Works on any Steam account worldwide. No expiration date. Non-refundable once redeemed.

products.title: SteelSeries Arctis Nova 7 Wireless Gaming Headset - 2.4GHz Lossless + Bluetooth - 38 Hr Battery - USB-C - ClearCast Gen 2 Mic
products.description: Premium wireless gaming headset with simultaneous 2.4GHz lossless and Bluetooth connections. 38-hour battery life with fast charging (15 min = 3 hrs). ClearCast Gen 2 AI-powered noise-canceling microphone. Fully retractable mic boom. Nova Acoustic System with 360 Spatial Audio. ComfortMAX system with adjustable headband and AirWeave memory foam cushions. Compatible with PC, PS5, Switch, and mobile.

products.title: Kindle Paperwhite (16 GB) - Now with a 7" display, adjustable warm light, increased battery life, and faster page turns - Agave Green
products.description: The thinnest, lightest Kindle Paperwhite yet with a 7-inch glare-free display and adjustable warm light for comfortable reading day or night. Up to 12 weeks of battery life on a single charge. Waterproof (IPX8) so you can read in the bath or by the pool. 16 GB storage holds thousands of books. Includes 3 months of Kindle Unlimited.

products.title: UGG Oversized Knit Throw Blanket, 70 x 50 Inches - Soft Chenille Knit for Couch, Bed, and Living Room - Snow
products.description: Plush oversized chenille throw blanket from UGG. Ultra-soft knit in a neutral cream tone that complements any decor. Generous 70 x 50 inch size perfect for curling up on the couch. Machine washable and gets softer with each wash. Arrives in a premium gift box.

products.title: YETI Rambler 20 oz Tumbler, Stainless Steel, Vacuum Insulated with MagSlider Lid - Black
products.description: The YETI Rambler 20 oz Tumbler keeps drinks hot or cold for hours with double-wall vacuum insulation. Durable 18/8 stainless steel construction. BPA-free MagSlider Lid uses magnets to keep your drink protected. Fits standard-size cup holders. Dishwasher safe.

products.title: Starbucks Premium Coffee Gift Set - Pike Place Roast Ground Coffee, Holiday Blend, and Ceramic Mug
products.description: A curated Starbucks coffee gift set featuring a 12 oz bag of Pike Place Roast ground coffee, a 10 oz bag of seasonal Holiday Blend, and a collectible Starbucks ceramic mug. Packaged in a festive gift box. Perfect for the coffee lover in your life.

products.title: Godiva Chocolatier Holiday Gift Box - Assorted Dark, Milk, and White Chocolate Truffles, 24 Piece
products.description: An elegant assortment of 24 Godiva chocolate truffles in dark, milk, and white chocolate varieties. Includes classic flavors like hazelnut praline, salted caramel, and raspberry ganache. Presented in Godiva's signature gold gift box with ribbon.

products.title: Fluval Plant Spectrum 3.0 LED Light, 36-48 Inch - Full Spectrum Programmable Aquarium Light for Freshwater Planted Tanks
products.description: Professional-grade LED aquarium light designed for planted freshwater tanks. Full spectrum output with adjustable RGB+W channels via Fluval app. Programmable sunrise, sunset, and weather effects. Extendable mounting brackets fit 36 to 48 inch tanks. 6500K daylight spectrum promotes healthy plant growth including demanding carpeting species.

products.title: Walkerswood Traditional Jamaican Jerk Seasoning, Hot & Spicy, 10 oz
products.description: Authentic Jamaican jerk seasoning paste made with scotch bonnet peppers, thyme, allspice, and scallions. Ready to use as a marinade or cooking sauce. Made in Jamaica.

products.title: Pink Butcher Paper Roll for Smoking Meat - FDA Approved, Peach Paper for BBQ Brisket, 18 Inch x 150 Feet
products.description: Premium quality pink butcher paper designed for smoking meats. FDA approved food-grade paper that allows smoke to penetrate while protecting against over-smoking. Retains moisture for juicier brisket, ribs, and pulled pork. 18 inches wide, 150 foot roll.
